title: Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and refreshing dish that combines the rich taste of lamb with the brightness of a Greek-inspired marinade.

ingredients.name: Lamb (leg or shoulder), cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure to trim any excess fat

ingredients.name: Piquant (such as oregano, thyme, and rosemary) olive oil
ingredients.notes: Combine oregano, thyme, and rosemary in a bowl

ingredients.name: Juicy (such as lemon juice) and Greek yogurt
ingredients.notes: Use a 2:1 ratio of lemon juice to yogurt

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak skewers in water for at least 30 minutes

instructions: In a large bowl, combine lamb cubes, piquant olive oil, juicy and Greek yogurt mixture, salt, pepper, and garlic.
Mix well to coat lamb evenly.
Thread lamb cubes, cherry tomatoes, and onions onto skewers.
Brush skewers with a little more piquant olive oil.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F for medium-rare.
Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of Greek salad or roasted vegetables.
